from __future__ import annotations


class OrderManager:
    def parse(self, raw: str) -> dict[str, str]:
        key, value = raw.split("=", 1)
        return {key: value}

    def save(self, order: dict[str, str]) -> str:
        return f"saved:{order}"

    def render(self, order: dict[str, str]) -> str:
        return f"<li>{order}</li>"
